prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7712、2026年计划小幅扩招（+1人）及本省物理类考生减少约2.85%等因素，扩招效应微弱（理论推后约58名），而考生减少使竞争略有缓解，两者对冲后位次预计小幅前移。预测2026年最低位次约7700名，区间7200–8200名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 6155 → 4393 → 4876 → 8902 → 7712. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform and category adjustment, there was a significant backward shift (8902), which rebounded to 7712 in 2025. The fluctuation has been large in recent two years, with the 2025 baseline around 7712. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was about 74–75 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 79 in 2024, and 80 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 81 students, a slight expansion of 1 student (+1.25%) compared to 2025, with minimal impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 38th, with a stable ranking in the 36–39 range in recent years, belonging to the top domestic engineering universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. The Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 82nd, evaluated as 'average', with medium-low short video exposure, and no abnormal increase in application attention. In 2025, there was an internship safety incident (somewhat negative), but it has passed the cycle, with limited impact on 2026 application psychology. Control Science and Engineering is A+ (top in the country), Computer Science and Technology is A, Metallurgical Engineering is A, Mechanical Engineering is A-, Materials Science and Engineering is A-, Software Engineering is A-, with a total of 6 A- and above disciplines, highlighting strong engineering strength and strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended hot majors. Automation is relatively hot, Mechanical/Intelligent Manufacturing is divided and wait-and-see, and Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged. Northeastern University mainly recruits engineering majors in Heilongjiang, with concentrated popular majors, maintaining a high overall application heat. In 2026, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province is about 114,000, a decrease of about 2.85% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition. Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, close to Heilongjiang Province in the same Northeast region, with strong local candidates' willingness to apply. The university's Physics Category enrollment plan in Heilongjiang accounts for a relatively small proportion of its national total plan, but the plan has been steadily increasing in recent years, making it relatively friendly to Heilongjiang candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 7712, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+1 student), and the reduction of Physics Category candidates in the province by about 2.85%, the expansion effect is weak (theoretical pushback of about 58 places), while the reduction in candidates slightly eases competition. The two factors offset each other, and the ranking is expected to move slightly forward. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 7700, with a range of 7200–8200.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Artificial Intelligence (Future Technology College/Zhixing Elite Class)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Automation (including Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc.)
- Robotics Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Computer Science (Software Engineering, Information Security, Virtual Reality Technology)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering
- Mechanical Engineering (including Mechanical Engineering, Vacuum Engineering and Technology, etc.)
- Energy and Power Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Materials Science (including Materials Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (1) (Metallurgy, Environment, Resource Recycling)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Business Administration, Accounting, etc.)
- Architecture (Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7200–8200, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety. For rankings better than 7200, focus on impacting flagship majors such as Artificial Intelligence and Computer Science and Technology. For rankings around 7700, it is recommended to choose Automation and Computer Science as core options. For rankings close to 8200, use Tier 3 majors as a safety, while also paying attention to Tier 2 majors such as Mechanical Engineering and Energy and Power.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 历史类招生专业仅公共管理类（含法学）和外国语言文学类，法学社会热度偏热（推荐），外语类一般观望；本省2026年历史类考生估算约5.3万人，较2025年减少约3.23%，竞争略有缓解；东北大学位于辽宁沈阳，与黑龙江同属东北地区，地域接近性有利于吸引本省考生；历史类招生计划近年稳中有增，2026年持平，对黑龙江文科考生保持稳定开放。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1422、2026年招生计划持平及本省历史类考生减少约3.23%等因素，计划不变而考生减少使竞争略有缓解，位次预计小幅前移。预测2026年最低位次约1392名，区间1183–1601名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 1160 → 1073 → 1928 → 1355 → 1422. In 2023, due to batch merging, there was a significant backward shift (1928), but from 2024 to 2025, it gradually stabilized to the 1355–1422 range, with a baseline of about 1422 in 2025. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 12 students in 2021–2022, 14 in 2023–2024, and 15 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 15 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 38th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years. As a top comprehensive university in Northeast China, although its liberal arts are not the strongest, it still attracts students due to its 985 platform. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd, with an evaluation of 'average,' indicating stable application attention. Northeastern University's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering, but the 985 platform still holds some appeal for liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The History Category only offers two majors: Public Administration (including Law) and Foreign Languages and Literature. Law has a relatively high social popularity (recommended), while foreign languages are generally wait-and-see. The estimated number of History Category examinees in the province for 2026 is about 53,000, a decrease of approximately 3.23% from 2025, slightly easing competition. Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning, which is in the same Northeast region as Heilongjiang, and the geographical proximity helps attract local students. The History Category enrollment plan has been steadily increasing in recent years, with no change in 2026, maintaining stable openness for Heilongjiang liberal arts students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1422, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, and the approximately 3.23% decrease in provincial History Category examinees, the unchanged plan and reduced number of examinees slightly ease competition, leading to an expected slight forward shift in ranking. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 1392, with a range of 1183–1601.

- Public Administration (including Law, Public Administration, Administrative Management, Land Resource Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- None (only 2 majors, two tiers suffice).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The History Category has only 2 majors. With rankings within the predicted range of 1183–1601, it is recommended to prioritize Public Administration (including Law) as the main choice, with Foreign Languages and Literature as a backup. If the ranking is better than 1183, focus on Public Administration; if around 1392, both majors are safe choices; if close to 1601, use Foreign Languages and Literature as a backup.
